questions.prompt: Which selector matches all disabled inputs?

options: Any link whose href starts with 'https'
Any link whose href ends with 'https'

questions.code:
input[type="email"] { background: yellow; }

<input type="text">
<input type="email">
<input type="password">
questions.explanation: The attribute selector matches only inputs whose type equals "email".

questions.prompt: Make any link ending in '.pdf' show in green.
questions.broken:
/* fix this selector so it targets links whose href ends with .pdf */
a[href=".pdf"] { color: green; }
questions.explanation: a[href$=".pdf"] matches any href ending in .pdf.
